office-lunch-ranchi.title: Office Lunch Delivery in Ranchi
office-lunch-ranchi.angle: Daily lunch programs for teams — consistent, affordable, on-time
office-lunch-ranchi.description: Daily lunch programs for office employees and working professionals. Fresh, hot, and hygienic home-style meals delivered straight to your workspace.
includes: Individually packed, leak-proof premium thalis.
Daily rotating menu featuring seasonal vegetables, dal, rice, and fresh chapatis.
Strict delivery schedules to ensure meals arrive before your lunch break.
Hygienically prepared using premium ingredients and low oil.

faqs.q: What is the minimum order quantity for office delivery?
faqs.a: For daily corporate plans, the minimum is 5 meals. For one-time office meetings, we support events of any scale.

faqs.q: Can we choose between veg and non-veg meals?
faqs.a: Yes, we allow custom ratios of veg and non-veg options for your team. You can adjust the counts with 24 hours' notice.

corporate-lunch-ranchi.title: Corporate Lunch Catering in Ranchi
corporate-lunch-ranchi.angle: Recurring meal contracts for companies, HR-friendly billing
corporate-lunch-ranchi.description: Premium recurring corporate cafeteria and lunch contracts for organizations, businesses, and coaching centers.
includes: Customizable menus tailored to staff taste preferences and budgets.
Flexible monthly billing, itemized invoicing, and contract management.
Buffet setup support or individually packaged meals.
Compliance with highest industry standard safety and health regulations.

faqs.q: Do you provide buffet servers for corporate dining?
faqs.a: Yes, for corporate accounts of 50+ staff, we can provide dedicated service staff, buffet heaters, and setups.

faqs.q: Are trials available before signing a long-term contract?
faqs.a: Absolutely. We offer paid 3-day meal trials so your team can sample our food quality and delivery promptness.

pg-food-supply-ranchi.title: PG Food Supply in Ranchi
pg-food-supply-ranchi.angle: Daily meal supply for PG accommodations, flexible quantities
pg-food-supply-ranchi.description: Reliable meal catering for PG (Paying Guest) owners. Keep your residents happy and well-fed with home-style Indian cuisine.
includes: Timely breakfast, lunch, and dinner batches supplied daily.
Flexible billing scaling up or down depending on resident occupancy.
Traditional home-style recipes that make residents feel close to home.
High hygiene standards with monthly feedback reviews.

faqs.q: How do you manage fluctuating student counts in PGs?
faqs.a: We operate with a simple check-in sheet where owners notify us by 7:00 AM of any major daily changes in numbers.

faqs.q: Do you serve special meals on festivals?
faqs.a: Yes, we celebrate festivals with special menus like kheer, poori, paneer, or chicken curry at no extra cost for regular PG partners.

hostel-food-supply-ranchi.title: Hostel Food Supply in Ranchi
hostel-food-supply-ranchi.angle: Large-scale daily meals for hostels, consistent quality at volume
hostel-food-supply-ranchi.description: Bulk boarding meals for educational institutes, private hostels, and training centers across Ranchi since 1999.
includes: Healthy, low-oil, low-spice recipes designed for daily consumption.
Bulk container hot deliveries or on-premise service options.
Nutritious high-protein diets containing milk, eggs, paneer, and lean meat.
Cost-optimized packages for large student counts.

faqs.q: How large of a hostel can you cater to?
faqs.a: We have capacity to cook up to 1,000 meals daily in our centralized commercial kitchen and deliver safely using transport trucks.

faqs.q: Are you licensed under food safety authorities?
faqs.a: Yes, Student's Mess is fully FSSAI registered and strictly follows food preparation safety rules.

student-tiffin-ranchi.title: Student Tiffin Service in Ranchi
student-tiffin-ranchi.angle: Affordable home style tiffin for students living away from home
student-tiffin-ranchi.description: Affordable, healthy, and hygienic home-style daily tiffin boxes for students living away from home for coaching and college.
includes: Pocket-friendly plans starting from basic veg thalis.
Convenient monthly billing cards with easy pausing of meals during exams/holidays.
Hot takeaway collection or delivery near major coaching hubs.
Healthy ingredients that mimic mother's cooking.

faqs.q: Can I pause my tiffin during vacations or holidays?
faqs.a: Yes, students can pause meals via WhatsApp with 12 hours' notice, and the billing dates adjust automatically.

faqs.q: Is the food spicy or oily?
faqs.a: No, we use minimal spices and heart-healthy oils so students can eat our food twice a day without stomach issues.

veg-meals-ranchi.title: Veg Meals in Ranchi
veg-meals-ranchi.angle: Pure vegetarian home style meals, daily or on-demand
veg-meals-ranchi.description: Hygienically prepared pure vegetarian thalis and meals, using fresh local vegetables and homemade spice blends.
includes: 100% vegetarian separate preparation kitchen space.
Includes basmati rice, soft wheat chapatis, dal, and two seasonal vegetables.
Freshly prepared salads and house pickles served with every meal.
Hassle-free takeaway packaging.

faqs.q: Do you use MSG or baking soda in your food?
faqs.a: No. We prepare clean home food. We do not use MSG, chemical food colors, or soda in our kitchen.

faqs.q: Do you have paneer or special dishes in veg meals?
faqs.a: Yes, our daily rotating menu includes special dishes like Paneer Masala, Kofta, or Kadhi on designated days of the week.

non-veg-meals-ranchi.title: Non-Veg Meals in Ranchi
non-veg-meals-ranchi.angle: Fresh non-veg home style meals, hygienically prepared
non-veg-meals-ranchi.description: Succulent chicken, egg, and fish curries prepared with home-style recipes. Clean, delicious, and deeply satisfying.
includes: Fresh meat sourced daily from certified clean vendors.
Traditional slow-cooked curry styles (Dehati Chicken, Egg Curry).
Prepared separately from general vegetarian meals to maintain sanctity.
Perfect portions of protein with rice and warm chapatis.

faqs.q: What days do you prepare non-veg meals?
faqs.a: Non-veg meals are prepared on Wednesdays, Fridays, and Sundays. Egg curry options are also available on request on other days.

faqs.q: Is the meat halal?
faqs.a: Yes, all chicken and meat sourced is 100% Halal cut.

daily-lunch-ranchi.title: Daily Lunch Service in Ranchi
daily-lunch-ranchi.description: Satisfying midday meal plans. Energy-rich home food to fuel your afternoon classes or desk job.
includes: Light and balanced lunch items to prevent post-lunch sluggishness.
Packed fresh at 11:30 AM and shipped immediately.
Comfort food: yellow dal, rice, light dry subzi, and fresh chapatis.
Takeaway pickup slots available.

faqs.q: What time is lunch available for takeaway?
faqs.a: Takeaway lunch is ready from 12:00 PM to 3:00 PM daily at our main location.

daily-dinner-ranchi.title: Daily Dinner Service in Ranchi
daily-dinner-ranchi.description: Wrap up your day with a comforting, warm dinner. No cooking stress, just sit back and enjoy a home-style plate.
includes: Warm chapatis, seasonal curries, and comforting soups/dals.
Available for collection or delivery between 7:30 PM and 9:30 PM.
Easy digestion meals to promote healthy sleep.
Fresh salad and curd accompaniments.

faqs.q: Can I swap rice for extra rotis for dinner?
faqs.a: Yes. You can customize your roti/rice ratio for all daily subscription dinner plans.

construction-site-meals-ranchi.title: Construction Site Meal Supply in Ranchi
construction-site-meals-ranchi.angle: Bulk meals for labor sites, flexible timing and volume
construction-site-meals-ranchi.description: High-volume, highly nutritious, and budget-friendly daily catering for construction workers, laborers, and site supervisors.
includes: Heavy, carbohydrate-rich filling meals designed for physical workers.
Highly competitive per-meal rates for large ongoing contracts.
Insulated transit containers to keep food hot on-site.
Flexible schedules matching site shift shifts.

faqs.q: What is the minimum volume for construction site supply?
faqs.a: We provide site catering starting from 25 workers daily, with pricing discounts scaling up to 300+ workers.

hospital-meal-supply-ranchi.title: Hospital Meal Supply in Ranchi
hospital-meal-supply-ranchi.angle: Hygienic, timely meal supply for hospital staff/patients (non-medical diet)
hospital-meal-supply-ranchi.description: Extremely clean, timely, and balanced catering solutions for hospital staff, doctors, and patient attendants.
includes: Zero oil/spice medical-grade options available on special request.
Hygienically sealed single-use containers.
Timely shifts covering early breakfasts and night duty staffs.
Wholesome vegetable soups, boiled eggs, and light dal khichdi.

faqs.q: Do you provide custom low-salt meals for patients?
faqs.a: Yes, we can prepare a separate batch of low-sodium, non-spicy meals for patient recovery support (non-critical diets only).

worker-meal-supply-ranchi.title: Worker Meal Supply in Ranchi
worker-meal-supply-ranchi.angle: Bulk daily meals for factories, warehouses, and worker canteens
worker-meal-supply-ranchi.description: Regular hot food supply for industrial staff, factory workers, and warehouse teams. Fueling Ranchi's workforce.
includes: Satisfying meals containing adequate protein and carbohydrates.
Strict delivery mapping matching shift change timings.
Low-overhead bulk serving models.
Consistent taste and high-grade food safety.

faqs.q: Do you cover industrial areas like Tupudana or Kokar?
faqs.a: Yes, we arrange bulk delivery trucks to industrial pockets of Kokar, Tupudana, and Tatisilwai.

event-catering-ranchi.title: Event Catering in Ranchi
event-catering-ranchi.angle: Home style catering for gatherings, meetings, and small events
event-catering-ranchi.description: Delicious home-style food catering for small get-togethers, birthdays, corporate seminars, and religious functions.
includes: Premium thali configurations and dessert menus.
Custom buffet styling and server hospitality staff.
Prepared with top-tier spices, pure ghee, and premium basmati.
Freshly prepared sweets (Gulab Jamun, Kheer, Halwa).

faqs.q: What is the advance booking duration needed for events?
faqs.a: We require at least 48 to 72 hours of advance booking confirmation for custom menus and setups.
